ModulesContext.title: What do you want to monitor?
ModulesContext.subtitle: Select which monitor you want to analyze

monitor-de-seca-ana.title: Drought Monitor | ANA
monitor-de-seca-ana.description: Monitors the drought situation in Brazil based on ANA's official monthly classification.

indice-integrado-de-secas.title: Integrated Drought Index
indice-integrado-de-secas.description: Indicates accumulated drought over 6 months (IIS6) based on integrated CEMADEN indicators.

cdi.title: CDI
cdi.description: Monthly monitors drought stages based on the Composite Drought Index (CDI) implemented by OCA following Cammalleri et al. 2021.

indice-de-degradacao.title: Degradation Index
indice-de-degradacao.description: Shows the land degradation levels in Brazil, from conserved to more degraded areas.

percentual-de-pobreza-cadunico.title: Poverty Percentage - CadÚnico
percentual-de-pobreza-cadunico.description: Percentage of families registered in CadÚnico in poverty aggregated by municipality.

cobertura-da-terra-ibge.title: Land Cover | IBGE
cobertura-da-terra-ibge.description: Presents the distribution of land cover classes in Brazil based on IBGE mapping.

indice-de-aridez.title: Aridity Index
indice-de-aridez.description: Indicates the aridity classes of the region, implemented by OCA using data from Xavier et al. 2021.

carbono-organico-do-solo-embrapa.title: Soil Organic Carbon | Embrapa
carbono-organico-do-solo-embrapa.description: Shows the distribution of soil organic carbon in Brazil based on Embrapa data.

dinamica-da-degradacao-da-terra-ods-15-3.title: Land Degradation Dynamics - SDG 15.3.1
dinamica-da-degradacao-da-terra-ods-15-3.description: Indicates whether land is degrading, stable, or improving in the Brazilian territory.
